prompt: Create a raw Y2K fashion editorial flash photograph of an adult woman posing diagonally against a plain teal-blue studio wall, framed from upper head to hips with the body tilted across the image. Her face is intentionally obscured by a flat opaque beige-gray rectangular block, while messy dark hair is tied up with loose strands flying around. She wears a pink-and-white gingham spaghetti-strap crop top with a loose flared hem and thin side ties, layered silver necklaces, oversized glossy dark brown leather gloves on both hands, and low-rise light blue denim jeans worn open and slouched to reveal a white waistband underneath. One gloved hand pinches the open jeans near the button, the other arm is bent upward with the hand near the top right, giving an offbeat candid party-photo pose. Use harsh direct camera flash, visible hard shadows, slightly washed highlights on skin and denim, gritty compact-camera texture, 2000s magazine snapshot styling, close crop, no text, no logos, realistic skin and fabric detail, vertical 4:3 composition.
